{{CargoOrgan
|name=White's Pegleg
|type=Common
|rank=blue
|id=10818
|idx=19
|description="My mind is set on one goal: retrieve Mr. White's lost leg. How dare that arrogant Johnny wrong Mr. White? I will not have it"
—Let the Pegleg Fly
|skill=
|hp=1528
|def=94
|atk=78
|rush=93
|gene1=Watching an Ad drops 1 Ad Chest by +10%
|gene2=In Snail Arena, {race} RUSH +20
|gene3=Watching an Ad drops 1 Ad Chest by +10%
|gene7=Watching an Ad drops 1 Ad Chest by +10% (Awakened)
|}}
